# Agent plugins

Installable packagings of one thing: the `agent-factory` skill that teaches an AI coding agent to drive the `af` CLI. Install the one for your agent and it can run and schedule af sessions in any repo — including sessions af did not launch.

Every file in this directory is **generated** from `session.AfPluginUsageReference`, the same af usage guidance af injects into the agents it launches itself. Edit `session/systemprompt.go` and run `scripts/gen-docs.sh`; hand-edits here are reverted and fail CI.

The plugin does **not** install `af`. Install it first:

```
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/sachiniyer/agent-factory/master/install.sh | sh
```

## codex

Codex plugin, served from this repo's marketplace (`.agents/plugins/marketplace.json`).

```
codex plugin marketplace add sachiniyer/agent-factory
codex plugin add agent-factory@agent-factory
```

## claude

Claude Code plugin, served from this repo's marketplace (`.claude-plugin/marketplace.json`).

```
claude plugin marketplace add sachiniyer/agent-factory
claude plugin install agent-factory@agent-factory
```

## gemini

Skill directory. `gemini skills install` reads it straight out of the repo; an installable Gemini CLI *extension* is not shipped yet (packaging unverified).

```
gemini skills install https://github.com/sachiniyer/agent-factory --path plugins/gemini/agent-factory
```

## amp

Skill directory copied from a clone into Amp's documented `.agents/skills/` project directory. Amp has no skill-install command or marketplace.

```
git clone https://github.com/sachiniyer/agent-factory
mkdir -p .agents/skills
cp -R agent-factory/plugins/amp/agent-factory .agents/skills/
```

See [docs/agent-plugins.md](../docs/agent-plugins.md) for what each packaging does and does not do.
